title: B12 Vegan Dosage Calculator 2026 | Hacé Cuentas
description: 🩺 Vegan B12 calculator: find your dose—250 mcg daily or 2000 mcg weekly. Required for vegans. Free.
intro: **Vitamin B12 (cobalamin)** doesn't occur reliably in plant sources. All B12 on Earth is synthesized by bacteria; animals accumulate it by consuming bacteria-rich foods. Vegans **must supplement**—it's mandatory—because deficiency causes megaloblastic anemia, peripheral neuropathy, and irreversible neurological damage. The RDA is **2.4 mcg/day**, but recommended supplement doses are much higher because absorption drops sharply at higher doses: **250 mcg/day oral or 2000 mcg/week** (sublingual or chewable works better than swallowed capsule). For vegan pregnancy and nursing: **250 mcg/day** consistently. This calculator provides the correct dose based on your frequency and life stage.
keyTakeaway: Vegan B12: **250 mcg/day OR 2000 mcg/week**. No reliable plant sources. Supplementation is mandatory.
useCases: Strict vegetarian without eggs or dairy.

example.title: Example: Adult vegan, weekly dosing
example.result: **2000 mcg sublingual once/week**. Check serum B12 + methylmalonic acid every 2 years.

explanation:
## What is B12

Water-soluble vitamin synthesized by bacteria.

## Why vegans must supplement

- No reliable plant sources.
- Spirulina and algae contain B12 'analogues' (inactive, can worsen).
- Fortified nutritional yeast is a minor option.

## Dosing by frequency

| Frequency | Dosage |
|---|---|
| Daily | 250 mcg |
| Twice weekly | 1000 mcg |
| Weekly | 2000 mcg |

## Forms

| Form | Advantages |
|---|---|
| Cyanocobalamin | Cheap, stable, most studied |
| Methylcobalamin | Active, better in severe deficiency |
| Hydroxocobalamin | Depot (injectable) |

## Signs of deficiency

- Fatigue, pallor.
- Paresthesias (tingling).
- Memory loss.
- Glossitis.
- Depression.
- Macrocytic anemia (MCV >100).

## Diagnosis

- **Serum B12**: <200 pg/ml deficient; 200–300 gray zone.
- **Methylmalonic acid**: more sensitive.
- **Homocysteine**: elevated in deficiency.

## Common mistakes

1. Believing spirulina provides B12.
2. Postponing supplement "6 more months".
3. Swallowed capsule (sublingual better for vegans with compromised absorption).
4. Low doses (25 mcg is not enough).

## Related calculators

- [Vegan macros](/calculadora-macros-vegana-dieta).
- [Plant-based iron](/calculadora-hierro-diario-vegetariano).
- [Omega-3 ratio](/calculadora-omega-3-6-ratio).

Monitor with bloodwork every 1–2 years.

faq.a: No. It contains B12 analogues, which are inactive.

faq.q: What is the daily B12 dosage for vegans?
Is sublingual B12 better than capsules?
faq.a: In some cases yes; capsule works fine if absorption is normal.
Only if fortified and if you're tracking the mcg content.

faq.q: How often should I test B12 levels?
faq.a: Serum B12 + methylmalonic acid every 1–2 years.
Risk of megaloblastic anemia, neuropathy, and irreversible neurological damage.
Cyanocobalamin is cheapest and most studied; methylcobalamin is more bioactive.

sources.name: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health
